Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a floating status overlay showing MyTweak ON/DISABLED and Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. Click the overlay lines to toggle.
Changelog: v1.0.5.9: remove the old on-screen status overlay (the clickable O/O master + burst symbols) — burst state now lives in the Next Action Tracker; master/burst still toggle via /mytweak disable|enable and /mytweak burst. v1.0.5.8: Dancer dance-step presses mirror under Performance Mode. v1.0.5.7: hotfix reverting the 1.0.5.6 change that broke action pulses. v1.0.5.5: add Next Action Tracker window (/mytweak tracker).
